title: Asian 3pc Celebrity Insulated Casseroles Hot Pots Food Warmers (2500/3500/5500ml) (Beige)
features: Asian 3pc Celebrity Insulated Casseroles Hot Pots Food Warmers(Stainless Steel Lid & Bowl) (2500/3500/5500ml)
Thick double wall insulation and stainless steel fixed inner casing keeps food hot and fresh for 4-6 hours
No re-heating of food required so retaining essential nutrients, taste and aroma
Twist locking lid with a stylish grip handle for secure fastening and easy handling
Inner Bowl is made out of 18/8 quality stainless steel - Middle layer is insulated using good quality PUF
description: Asian 3pc Celebrity Insulated Casseroles Hot Pots Food Warmers (2500/3500/5500ml)
